name: Drabya Hamal
title: AI & Web Development Enthusiast
summary: AI undergraduate with practical experience in web development, content management, and multimedia creation through an internship at Geofinity Solutions Pvt. Ltd. Skilled in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python and Git, with a strong foundation in responsive design and collaborative teamwork. Eager to apply technical skills, learn from industry professionals, and contribute effectively in a technology-focused internship role.

points: Designed the internal web page using the company's ERP system's page builder.
Customized page layouts, added dynamic content, and ensured responsive design across devices.
Gained hands-on experience with web technologies and version control (Git).
Produced engaging marketing and explainer videos for the company.
Worked with tools like Runway, Canva, and Adobe Premiere Pro.
Provided an animated product demo tailored for the company's new application.

education.degree: BSc (Hons) in Computer Science — Artificial Intelligence
points: Built a full-stack website using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, and Flask.
Created a command-line based software for a car company.
Developed the front end for a movie site.
Passed out with a GPA of 3.59/4.0.

projects.title: Full-Stack Website
projects.description: A complete full-stack web application built as part of my BSc coursework, covering front-end UI and a Flask-powered back end.

projects.title: Car Company CLI Software
projects.description: A command-line based management tool developed for a car company, handling core business logic via a clean terminal interface.

projects.title: Movie Site Front End
projects.description: A responsive, visually engaging front end for a movie browsing website with modern UI components.

projects.title: Geofinity Product Demo
projects.description: An animated product demo video produced for Geofinity Solutions' new application, showcasing features to prospective clients.
